title: Eating Animation - BetterVanillaBuilding Addon
description: An addon for the Better Vanilla Building texture pack to add animations when eating!
body:
## BVB Eating Animation

This resource pack adds animation for when you are eating food using the BetterVanillaBuilding resource pack. 

You must use the eating animation mod for Minecraft either on Forge or Fabric!

#### Eating Animation [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) | [Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animations)
#### BetterVanillaBuilding [Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bettervanillabuilding)
#### Visit the offcial BetterVanillaBuilding [website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com)

- Optifine is not required for this resource pack. 
- If you use Optifine download the **forge** version of Eating Animation
- Make sure to put this resource pack above BetterVanillaBuilding

Huge thanks to [stefanJ2]([https://modrinth.com/user/stefanJ2](https://modrinth.com/user/stefanJ2)) for giving us a great texturepack!
Another huge thanks to [theoness1]([https://modrinth.com/user/theoness1](https://modrinth.com/user/theoness1)) for making the mod for us all to enjoy.
Without these developers this pack would not exist. Please enjoy!

If you have any problems with the pack or you find a bug open a issue [here](https://github.com/BrownTurtleBear/Eating-Animation---BVB-Addon/issues)
